staging.label: Staging
staging.message: You are on a test environment. Data here is not production.

login.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to {email}
login.signInDescription: Sign in with a magic link sent to your email
login.clickLink: Click the link in your email to sign in. You can close this tab.
login.noAccount: No account? A magic link will create one automatically.
login.featureAccounts: Track all your accounts in one place

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Get started by setting up your financial dashboard in three easy steps.
dashboard.noCategoryExpenses: No expense transactions with categories in this range.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Search, filter, and manage income, expenses, and transfers.
transactions.matchColumns: Match each field to a column from your file ({count} columns).
transactions.importHelperText: All imported rows are assigned to this account. Sign of amount maps to income (positive) or expense (negative), per your CSV parser.
transactions.showingFirst: Showing first {shown} of {total} rows. Import will include all valid rows ({ready} ready).
transactions.addOrImport: Add a transaction or import a CSV to get started.
transactions.deleteConfirm: Delete this transaction? This cannot be undone.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Cash flow, spending mix, savings rate, and where your money concentrates.
analytics.netCashFlowDescription: Bars = income minus expenses · Line = savings rate (% of income saved). Common rule of thumb: aim for a positive, stable trend.
analytics.spendingConcentrationDescription: Pareto view: how much of total spending sits in your top categories (last 12 months). Helps spot over-reliance on a few buckets.
analytics.noExpenseData: No expense data in this period yet.
analytics.expenseTrendDescription: Stacked bars: top {count} categories by 6-month spend, plus {other}. Hover for a scrollable breakdown.
analytics.totalSpentLast12: Total spent in the last 12 months

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Preferences, categories, exports, and account data.
settings.currencyDescription: Used for display formatting across the app.
settings.categoriesDescription: Income and expense labels used in transactions and budgets.
settings.exportDescription: Download all transactions as a CSV file.
settings.backupDescription: Download all tables as one JSON file, or restore from a previous backup. Existing rows with the same id are updated.
settings.restoreHelper: Choose a .json file exported from this app.
settings.receiptDescription: Receipt uploads — Coming soon. Attach receipt photos to transactions using Supabase Storage.
settings.dangerDescription: Permanently delete all financial data for your account. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAllWarning: This removes transactions, accounts, categories, budgets, savings goals, investments, recurring rules, and your profile row. You will be signed out.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.description: Track spending against limits by category each month.
budgets.budgetHelper: Monthly budgets use the full amount each month. Yearly budgets are split into twelfths for this view.
budgets.overBudgetMessage: At least one category exceeded its limit for {month}.
budgets.onTrack: All categories are within budget this month.
budgets.noBudgetsHint: Create a budget to track spending by category. Start dates apply from the month you choose when adding.
budgets.noBudgetsStarted: No budgets started on or before this month, or you have not added any yet.
budgets.deleteConfirm: Delete this budget? This cannot be undone.

savings.title: Savings goals
savings.description: Track targets, contributions, and projected completion
savings.addDescription: Set a target and optional deadline. You can contribute or withdraw anytime.
savings.noGoalsHint: Create a goal to visualize progress, set deadlines, and log contributions.
savings.editDescription: Update amounts, deadline, or appearance for {name}.
savings.deleteGoalMessage: This will permanently remove {name}. This cannot be undone.
savings.withdrawLimit: Withdraws cannot exceed your current balance.

investments.title: Investments
investments.returnHint: (Value − cost) ÷ cost × 100; — if cost is zero
investments.mixedCurrencies: Mixed currencies: slice sizes use raw numbers without FX conversion.
investments.noPositionValue: No position value to chart (check shares and prices).
investments.holdingsHint: All positions, newest last in list order
investments.noPositionsHint: Track stocks, ETFs, crypto, and bonds. Add a position to see allocation and performance.
investments.deletePositionMessage: This will permanently remove {symbol} ({name}). This cannot be undone.
investments.addDescription: Enter symbol, cost basis (total for the position), and current price per share.

planning.title: Financial planning
planning.description: Recurring cash flows, projections, and retirement estimates.
planning.noRulesYet: No recurring rules yet. Add one to drive projections.
planning.cumulativeHint: Starts from current account balances, then adds projected net cash flow each month.
planning.additionalSavings: Additional monthly savings (added to net each month)

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.addDescription: Create a new account. Balances can be updated later from transactions.
accounts.netWorthHint: Sum of balances across all accounts marked active
accounts.noAccountsHint: Add your first account to track balances and assign transactions.
accounts.deleteAccountMessage: This will permanently remove {name} and cannot be undone. Linked transactions may be affected depending on your database rules.
